content.en:
Tens of thousands of years have passed.

At this time, the forces of the Great Universe gradually stabilized, and the number of living beings in the Great Universe also increased many times, and the number of major forces also increased a lot.

At the beginning, the composition of the major forces was all at the god general level and the heavenly monarch level, but in the future, these forces will not stay in the great universe for hundreds of thousands of years, but for a long time.

As a result, the major forces began to develop their power and recruit disciples, and some Heavenly Monarchs also enjoyed the taste of becoming the overlord of one side.

Moreover, the great universe has also given birth to many innate gods and demons and other races, and these innate gods and demons are all very talented, and they are the main members of the major forces to recruit disciples.

However, the progress of the human race is not slow, and a large number of god generals have been born, but they are basically one or two star god generals.

As for Ye Tian, he has also improved a lot.

Now, he had cultivated the fifth layer of the Xuanxuan Jue to the consummation realm, but he had also exhausted the auxiliary resources he had purchased from the Void Heaven Palace.

The strength has been increased to the combat power of the five-star mid-stage god general!

this day.

A message came from the Void Heaven Palace, and after Ye Tian received it, he was immediately overjoyed.

"A secret world has appeared, and there is a great opportunity in it!"

Ye Tian's expression moved, and he hurriedly rushed to the Void Heaven Palace.

At this time.

Dozens of divine generals have gathered at the gate of the Void Heaven Palace, and Peng Yu Tianjun is also here, obviously the leader of the team this time.

After Ye Tian arrived, he said, "I've seen Senior Brother Pengyu!"

"Senior Brother Ye Tian, you're here!" Peng Yu Tianjun nodded slightly.

Then, after waiting for a while, when the people were almost over, Peng Yu Tianjun said, "Let's go, let's go!"

Whoa!!

The group traveled to the secret world somewhere in the big universe.

On the way, Ye Tian asked Peng Yu Tianjun about the specific situation of the Secret Realm Great World.

"Senior Brother Pengyu, what is the chance of the Secret Realm Great World that appeared this time?"

Ye Tian asked.

Pengyu Tianjun said: "Senior Brother Ye Tian, this secret realm world was born decades ago, and as soon as it appeared, it was blocked by many of our top powers. The resources inside are very rich, and this is almost the first secret world born and born in the big universe, which is completely different from the secret world you used to be in the ordinary universe. It can even be said that some of the resources born from this Secret Realm Great World are of great use even to us Heavenly Monarchs. "

Ye Tian listened, and his heart was suddenly very interested.

If he gains a lot in this secret world, his strength will inevitably increase very quickly.

But at this time, Peng Yu Tianjun reminded again: "Senior Brother Ye Tian, I don't know if it's right or wrong to let you enter this secret realm world, but on the road of cultivation, any resources must be fought for, if you don't fight, how can you grow?" It's just that you are only a five-star god general now, and there are many god generals who have entered the secret realm world, and there are even seven-star god generals who will enter ......."

Peng Yu Tianjun's words were very obvious, if Ye Tian entered the Secret Realm Great World, it was very likely that he would fall.

As for letting the disciples of the Void Heaven Hall take care of Ye Tian, he didn't say anything.

Without him, once he enters the Secret Realm Great World, who knows if those Void Heaven Hall disciples will take care of Ye Tian, maybe there is a possibility of killing Ye Tian.

People's hearts are the most difficult to figure out, and brothers and family members may turn against each other, let alone just a member of a force!

"Senior Brother Pengyu, my power may not be good, but there are many life-saving means, as long as I don't meet the seven-star god general, I am enough to save my life!" Ye Tiandao.

"Really?"

Peng Yu Tianjun was extremely surprised.

In this way, Ye Tian is sure that he will save his life from the hands of the six-star god general?

You know, even if he is in Ye Tian's realm, there is no way to do this, unless it is a life-saving thing given by his master!

But what kind of character is the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, it is unlikely that he will give any life-saving things against the sky, and even if there is, it can basically only be used a few times.

Peng Yu Tianjun was not sure whether the life-saving thing Ye Tian said was his own life-saving means, or the life-saving thing given to him by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

He didn't ask, after all, he and Ye Tian were just brothers, and the relationship was not very deep.

If it weren't for the master who told him to take care of one or two, otherwise he wouldn't care about Ye Tian at all.

This time the Secret Realm Great World had a great chance, Ye Tian entered it voluntarily, if it really fell, the master would not blame him.

Besides, there are many formal disciples of Shizun, and I don't know how many have fallen on the way to growth.

Soon, the Great World of the Secret Realm arrived!

At this time, Ye Tian was very excited.

Because he can copy the talent of a famous god general, maybe this time he is expected to raise all his talents to the super god level and extreme talents.

The entrance to the Great World of the Secret Realm turned into a portal at this moment, and a famous Heavenly Monarch sat here, guarding the portal, and the many gods and generals who arrived did not dare to break into it at all.

Ye Tian's eyes swept and saw a dense crowd of divine generals and some heavenly monarchs.

"Copy the talent, check!"

Ye Tian's copying talent enveloped the audience, without attracting the attention of any Heavenly Monarch.

In an instant, all the talents of these people appeared in his sight.

Most of the gods and generals are not very surprised and are relatively popular, but some of the gods and heavenly monarchs are very good.

"A lot of extreme talents!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

In particular, there is an area where almost everyone has extreme talents, and it is clear that it is a Chaos race with extreme talents.

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

......

Ye Tian was very happy to keep copying talents, and in a short time, he copied dozens of extreme talents.

Super god-level talents, there are a lot of them here, after all, the gods and heavenly monarchs here are the top ones in the chaos, maybe in the chaos, it is difficult to upgrade the general attribute talents to the super god level, and it takes a lot of money, only true geniuses can do it.

But here, there is a real genius.

Moreover, Ye Tian also found a super god-level physical body talent, which is called the Chaos Battle Body Talent.

The super-god-level Chaos Battle Body talent comes from a god general.

As for this god general, Ye Tian also knew that he was a strong man on the god general list.

Sixth on the list of god generals: Tianba god general, seven-star late god general

Ye Tian's gaze only swept over the Heavenly Overlord General, and he didn't dare to pay too much attention, so as not to attract the attention of the other party.

While others were looking forward to the opening of the secret world, Ye Tian leisurely copied the super god-level talents, but in the end, he still didn't get all the attribute super god-level talents.

He lacks two attribute super god-level talents, that is, the super god-level talent of darkness and the super god-level talent of thunder.

Among so many god generals and heavenly monarchs, he didn't find these two types of super god-level talents.

However, the gods and generals of the entire great universe and the Heavenly Monarch have not all arrived, and he still hopes to gather within the great universe.

"I'm also satisfied, when I enter the secret world, find a place to fuse these talents first, my strength will definitely skyrocket. And when I fuse the super god-level source earth talent and the super god-level flesh body talent, I can produce the super god-level source earth element talent, and I can start cultivating that chaotic divine power, the ancient yuan imperial body divine power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
